description: Single-file JS project with two planted defects, licensed over bridge (license-only mode, no upload). First e2e for the JS image (the FIRST DHI-language-base image: node + Yarn from the dhi.io/node base + the in-place global eslint pin, no node toolchain). Proves qodana-js builds (base + eslint + dist + cli + runtime), loads its Ultimate WebStorm profile, and scans a real .js producing SARIF. Driver name + rule ids are NEEDS-PINNING starting guesses — pin from a CI control run and confirm both are enabled in THIS image's default WS (WebStorm) profile.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted `const unused = 42` local that is never read must surface; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate WebStorm profile.
STARTING-GUESS id: the planted loose `==` comparison must surface as an equality-with-coercion inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate WebStorm profile.
